results.title: Gurram Partheev
highlights:
Sr. GenAI/ML Data Scientist | Generative AI | Machine Learning | RAG, Deep Learning, NLP
...
Sr. GenAI ML Data Scientist at [Progressive Insurance](https://www.linkedin.com/company/progressive-insurance)
...
With over a decade of experience in machine learning, data engineering, and AI systems, I specialize in designing and implementing scalable Generative AI solutions. At Progressive Insurance, I contribute to the development of knowledge assistants and AI-driven tools to enhance underwriting, compliance, and claims processes. My work focuses on leveraging large language models, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and document intelligence systems to streamline operations and enable efficient analysis of regulatory and policy documents. My expertise spans Generative AI, NLP, and data engineering, with proficiency in tools such as Hugging Face Transformers, spaCy, and Spark. My goal is to create impactful, production-ready AI systems that empower teams to make data-driven decisions and optimize workflows. Through innovative AI applications, I aim to solve complex challenges and drive meaningful improvements in enterprise operations.
...
### Sr. GenAI ML Data Scientist at [Progressive Insurance](https://www.linkedin.com/company/progressive-insurance) (Current)
...
Building Generative AI solutions to help underwriting, compliance, and claims teams work more efficiently with large volumes of regulatory and policy documents. Designed a knowledge assistant that allows analysts to ask questions about underwriting rules, claim guidelines, and regulatory policies and receive summarized answers pulled from internal documentation. The system combines large language models with a retrieval layer so responses are grounded in company data rather than generic AI outputs. This has helped teams reduce the time spent manually searching through policy manuals and compliance documents during reviews. The platform also integrates fraud and risk analytics by combining AI-generated insights with structured claims and transaction data. Data pipelines process policy and claims information and feed dashboards used by operations teams to monitor fraud signals and portfolio risk trends. These AI services run as containerized microservices with monitoring and governance controls to ensure secure handling of policyholder data and reliable performance in production environments. Skills: Python

results.title: Geetha Sri
highlights:
Senior Data AI/ML Engineer | Generative AI, LLMs & Agentic AI | RAG, LangChain, LangGraph | Python, AWS, Spark, Kafka | MLOps & Data Engineering
...
Senior Data AI ML Engineer at [Progressive Insurance](https://www.linkedin.com/company/progressive-insurance)
...
As a Senior Data AI/ML Engineer, I specialize in building enterprise-grade Generative AI, Agentic AI, RAG, and cloud data engineering solutions that transform complex data into intelligent, scalable business applications. With experience across insurance, banking, healthcare, and enterprise data platforms, I have worked on LLM-powered applications, multi-agent workflows, semantic search, document Q&A, summarization, fraud/risk analytics, and real-time data pipelines. My technical background includes Python, LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, FastAPI, AWS, Spark, Kafka, Airflow, vector databases, and MLOps practices. My goal is to bridge advanced AI research with practical, production-ready systems that are secure, reliable, explainable, and valuable to business users. I enjoy collaborating with cross-functional teams to design AI and data solutions that improve automation, decision-making, and operational efficiency. Core Skills: Generative AI, LLMs, RAG, Agentic AI, Python, AWS, LangChain, LangGraph, Spark, Kafka, Airflow, FastAPI, MLOps, Data Engineering, Machine Learning, Vector Databases.
...
### Senior Data AI ML Engineer at [Progressive Insurance](https://www.linkedin.com/company/progressive-insurance) (Current)
...
Designed and deployed Generative AI and Agentic AI solutions using Python, LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, and AWS. Built RAG pipelines for document Q&A, summarization, semantic search, and enterprise knowledge retrieval. Developed AI agents and multi-step reasoning workflows using LangGraph state machines and LangChain-based tool orchestration. Integrated LLM-powered applications with FastAPI, AWS Lambda, Streamlit, Docker, and cloud services. Worked with vector databases such as FAISS, Pinecone, Weaviate, and Qdrant to support contextual search and hybrid retrieval. Created reusable prompt templates, dynamic prompt chains, and agent toolchains to improve model consistency and response quality. Fine-tuned and optimized LLM workflows using techniques such as few-shot prompting, hybrid search, and domain-specific prompt engineering. Implemented responsible AI practices including guardrails, output filtering, prompt injection prevention, and usage monitoring. Collaborated with product, data science, and engineering teams to identify GenAI use cases and deliver production-ready AI solutions.

4 prior funding rounds.

Built real-time feature pipelines to analyze payment events, transaction amounts, geolocation, user behavior, and risk indicators. Designed and productionized RAG pipelines combining structured and unstructured data with LLMs for document Q&A and intelligent assistants. Developed scalable data pipelines using Python, Scala, Spark, Airflow, Pandas, Kafka, and cloud platforms. results.title: Andrew DeGroot
highlights:
Senior Manager Data Scientist at Progressive Insurance
...
Senior Manager Data Science at [Progressive Insurance](https://www.linkedin.com/company/progressive-insurance)
...
In an expansive data science landscape, my skills as a full-stack data scientist and people leader directly contribute to deliver products emphasizing cross functional collaboration. From data engineering, through machine learning and statistical analysis, into AWS infrastructure, I craft products for business results. Implementing modern robust development patterns, I have brought value using data pipelines, feature stores, MLOps, restful APIs, NLP, generative AI, machine learning/deep learning, A/B/n testing, and real time model monitoring. All tools chosen at the right time in a maturing environment that improved production processes in collaboration with my business partners. Hailing from a strong research academic background, I methodically probe a problem to unpack and understand before launching development. True understanding brings informed choices which in turn brings useful products rather than technically complex projects that are of little business use. With a strong record of challenging assumptions, clarifying deliverables and setting priorities, I bring of green field ideas to realization. I emphasize cross functional teams for implementation to ensure robustness and depth of knowledge. With eight years of experience and a strong research background, I design to best-in-class data science products and then challenge my teams to reach this level. With each iteration we step forward in content and process. Always asking "What can we do better today?", I foster technical and professional growth for all team members. Together we drive through our product roadmap quickly delivering our MVP and rapidly iterating to maturity.
...

results.title: Venkat Nikhil K
highlights:
Gen AI Engineer
...
Senior Gen AI Engineer and Lead engineer with 10+ years of experience designing, building, and optimizing LLM-enabled data platforms across AWS, GCP, Azure, and Snowflake environments. Strong expertise in Big Data ecosystems including Hadoop, Spark, Hive, Kafka, Airflow, and dbt, with a focus on building AI/LLM-ready data architectures. Proven experience developing end-to-end ELT/ETL pipelines for structured, semi-structured, and unstructured data, enabling Generative AI, RAG-based analytics, and intelligent data applications at enterprise scale. Hands-on experience with Snowflake data warehousing, including Snowpipe, Streams, Tasks, performance tuning, cost optimization, data governance, and secure data access for AI workloads. Advanced proficiency in Python, PySpark, SQL, and Unix scripting, with experience building LLM-integrated pipelines, AI-driven validation frameworks, and intelligent automation workflows. Extensive experience with workflow orchestration using Apache Airflow, Cloud Composer, and dbt Cloud, supporting AI-driven data processing and real-time analytics. Collaborated with data scientists to productionize AI/ML models and enable LLM-powered applications, supporting both real-time and batch inference pipelines. Expertise in data ingestion from RDBMS, APIs, and streaming platforms using Kafka, Sqoop, Flume, and Pub/Sub, building event-driven architectures for AI and LLM use cases. Experience building real-time and batch processing pipelines using Spark, Dataflow, and Kafka Streams, enabling low-latency data delivery for AI/LLM systems. Strong understanding of data quality, governance, and AI-ready validation frameworks, ensuring reliable and audit-compliant datasets. Built and optimized data pipelines to support AI/ML and LLM workloads, ensuring high-quality, scalable, and low-latency feature delivery. Proven ability to collaborate with business stakeholders, offshore teams, and cross-functional engineering teams to deliver AI-enabled and Agentic AI-driven data solutions, leveraging Python, AWS Bedrock, LangChain, LangGraph, and prompt engineering. Experience across healthcare, finance, insurance, life sciences, and ad-tech domains, delivering LLM-integrated data platforms and Agentic AI workflows supporting advanced analytics and intelligent data applications.

results.title: [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II | Wfh
highlights:
# [Remote] Senior Generative AI Scientist II
...
Note: The job is a remote job and is open to candidates in USA. Cotiviti is a healthcare technology company focused on delivering better care at lower costs through advanced technology and data analytics. The Senior Generative AI Scientist II will work with a team to solve healthcare issues using machine learning and AI techniques, delivering value through innovative data solutions. Responsibilities • Work with key stakeholders within Research and Development as well as Business Operations, along with Product Management to assess the potential value and risks associated with business problems that have the potential to be solved using machine learning and Artificial Intelligence techniques • Develop an exploratory data analysis approach to verify the initial hypothesis associated with potential Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning use cases • Document your approach, thinking and results in standard approaches to allow other data scientists to collaborate with you on this work • Prepare your final trained model and develop a validation test set for QA • Work with ML Ops/Production operations to deploy your model into production and support them in monitoring model performance • Participate in design sessions to continuously develop and improve the Cotiviti machine learning platform • Participate in other data science initiatives, collaborating with your peers to support their projects • Participate in knowledge sharing sessions to bring new insights and technologies to the team • Provide End to End value-based solutions, including data pipeline, model creation and application for end user consumption • Complete all responsibilities as outlined in the annual performance review and/or goal setting • Complete all special projects and other duties as assigned • Must be able to perform duties with or without reasonable accommodation Skills • Graduate degree in a quantitative discipline such as Computer Science/Engineering, Statistics, Operations Research covering Advanced Statistics, Machine learning and AI • Experience with the latest techniques in natural language processing including transformers, fine-tuning LLMs, measuring/benchmarking and deploying LLMs with tools such as HuggingFace, Langchain, LLAMA/Mistral and OpenAI, vector databases • 5+ years of hands-on data science/AI experience, using typical machine learning and data science tools including pandas, scikit-learn, keras, nltk, and TensorFlow/PyTorch, GPU • Experience building production-grade machine learning deployments on AWS, Azure, or GCP • Experience working with Apache Spark™ and large-scale distributed datasets • Experience communicating technical concepts to non-technical and technical audiences is a plus • Flexibility to work with global teams as well geographically dispersed US based teams • Professional with ability to properly handle confidential information • Ability to work within a matrixed organization • Proficiency in all required skills and competencies above Benefits • Medical • Dental • Vision • Disability • Life insurance coverage • 401(k) savings plans • Paid family leave • 9 paid holidays per year • 17-27 days of Paid Time Off (PTO) per year, depending on specific level and length of service with Cotiviti. Company Overview • Cotiviti enables healthcare organizations to deliver better care at lower cost through advanced technology and data analytics that improve the quality and sustainability of healthcare in the United States. It was founded in 1979, and is headquartered in South Jordan, UT, US, with a workforce of 5001-10000 employees. Its website is Company H1B Sponsorship • Cotiviti has a track record of offering H1B sponsorships, with 165 in 2025, 118 in 2024, 90 in 2023, 102 in 2022, 72 in 2021, 67 in 2020. Please note that this does not guarantee sponsorship for this specific role.

results.title: Optum Hiring Data Scientist | Jobformore
highlights:
Optum Hiring Data Scientist | Jobformore
...
# Data Scientist
...
Optum is seeking a Data Science professional who is passionate about applying machine learning, Generative AI, and Large Language Models (LLMs) to solve complex healthcare problems on a scale. Imagine working with massive volumes of healthcare data spanning clinical, claims, behavioral, and digital interactions – powering intelligent personalization, discovery, and decision support for millions of members, providers, and care teams.
...
At Optum, the Data Science mission is to transform healthcare data into robust, scalable AI solutions, including LLM based and Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) systems that combine enterprise knowledge with advanced language models to deliver accurate, contextual, and trustworthy insights. These solutions help uncover deep usage patterns, member journeys, and care signals that inform and continuously evolve Optum’s digital products, clinical platforms, and healthcare services.
...
Your work will directly influence how healthcare consumers engage with digital experiences, how clinicians access timely insights, and how business and care strategies are shaped through data. By joining Optum’s data science team, you will be part of an exciting journey to build advanced ML and GenAI driven products, grounded in responsible AI principles, that operate at enterprise scale and create meaningful impact across the healthcare ecosystem.
...
- Design, develop, and deploy advanced analytics, machine learning, and Generative AI solutions to address complex healthcare and business problems using largescale structured and unstructured data
...
- Applies advanced techniques including statistics, machine learning, simulation, and mathematical modelling
...
- Build and optimize LLM based applications, including Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) frameworks, to enable accurate, context aware, and explainable insights from enterprise healthcare data sources such as clinical notes, claims, provider data, and policy documents
...
- Develop, evaluate, and finetune machine learning and GenAI models, including prompt engineering, retrieval strategies, and model evaluation techniques to improve accuracy, relevance, and performance
...
- Translate complex analytical and GenAI outputs into clear, actionable insights for business stakeholders, product teams, and leadership to support data driven decision making
...
- Support prototyping, validation, and deployment of GenAI and ML solutions, working with engineering teams to ensure solutions are scalable, secure, and maintainable. Continuously stay current with advancements in LLMs, GenAI frameworks, and healthcare AI trends, contributing innovative ideas and improvements to Optum’s capabilities
...
### Required Qualifications:
...
- 4+ years of experience in handling/active development in data science projects
...
- 4+ years of experience in Microsoft Azure Cloud, Databricks, Mlflow, Spark SQL & Python
...
- Experience using Machine Learning Algorithms: Linear & Logistic Regression, Time Series analysis, Support Vector Machine, K-Means clustering, K-Nearest Neighbors Decision Trees, Random Forest, Naive Bayes, PCA, SVD, Artificial Neural Networks, Association Rules, Genetic Algorithm, Optimization, Bagging and Boosting algorithms etc.
...
- Understanding of data, schema, data model, machine learning and how to bring efficiency in big data related life cycle
...
- Proven skills to create opportunities using machine learning or artificial intelligence
...
Optum, part of UnitedHealth Group, is a global health services and technology company revolutionizing healthcare delivery through data analytics, pharmacy benefits, and digital health solutions that connect millions to better care. Headquartered in Eden Prairie, Minnesota, Optum serves patients, providers, payers, and pharmacies worldwide with innovative platforms for care optimization, claims processing, and population health management.
